faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Metuchen home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small holes in wool, silk, or cashmere garments, webbing in closet corners, larvae casings on fabrics, and adult moths flying near wardrobes. You may also notice damage to carpets, upholstered furniture, or stored blankets. Our Metuchen technicians provide thorough inspections to confirm infestations and identify breeding sites.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth control cost in Metuchen, NJ?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in Metuchen typically ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the number of affected areas. Minor infestations in single rooms cost less, while whole-home treatments or commercial properties require more extensive service. We provide free estimates and customized treatment plans for every Metuchen property.

faqs.question: Are clothes moth treatments safe for my family and pets in Metuchen?
faqs.answer: Yes, we prioritize safety by using EPA-approved products and targeted application methods that effectively eliminate clothes moths while protecting your family and pets. Our technicians will provide specific instructions for preparation and re-entry times. We also offer eco-friendly treatment options for health-conscious Metuchen residents.

faqs.question: How can I prevent clothes moths from returning to my Metuchen property?
faqs.answer: Prevention includes regularly cleaning and vacuuming closets, storing woolens in sealed containers, using cedar blocks or lavender sachets, and maintaining low humidity levels. Periodically inspecting stored garments and dry cleaning items before storage also helps. Our Metuchen team provides comprehensive prevention strategies and can schedule follow-up treatments to ensure long-term protection of your valuable textiles.
